title: Shringeri Sharadamba Temple
tagline: Shringeri Sharadamba Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Sri Sharadamba Temple (ಶೃಂಗೇರಿ ಶಾರದಾಂಬೆ) is a temple dedicated to the Hindu goddess Sharadamba in the town of Sringeri in Karnataka, India, on the Tunga river.
overview.description: Sri Sharadamba Temple (ಶೃಂಗೇರಿ ಶಾರದಾಂಬೆ) is a temple dedicated to the Hindu goddess Sharadamba in the town of Sringeri in Karnataka, India, on the Tunga river. The Sharadamba Temple is an 8th-century temple, established by Adi Shankara, who also established his first Peetham and monastery at the site. The temple is part of the larger complex called Sringeri Sharada Peetham, which is the southern cardinal monastery established by Shankara. The other four are located in Dwarka (West), Puri (East) and Jyotirmath (North).

topPlaces.name: Sringeri Sharada Peetham
topPlaces.description: Dakṣiṇāmnāya Śrī Śāradā Pīṭham (IPA: [d̪ɐkʂiɳaːmn̪aːjɐ ɕriː ɕaːrɐd̪ɐ piːʈʰɐm]) or Śri Śṛṅgagiri Maṭha (IPA: [ɕriː ɕr̩ŋɡɐɡiri mɐʈʰɐ]); Sanskrit: मठ, maṭha) is one of the four cardinal pīthams following the Daśanāmi Sampradaya. The peetham or matha is traditionally believed to have been established by Ādi Śaṅkara to preserve and propagate Sanātana Dharma and Advaita Vedānta, the doctrine of non-dualism.

topPlaces.name: Sringeri
topPlaces.description: Sringeri (IAST: Śṛṅgerī; Kannada: [ʃriŋɡeːri]) also called Shringeri is a hill town and Taluk headquarters located in Chikmagalur district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Sringeri is the site of Sri Sharadamba temple, a part of the Sringeri Sharada Peetham established by Adi Shankaracharya.

topPlaces.name: Vidyaranyapura Agrahara, Sringeri
topPlaces.description: Vidyaranyapura Agrahara is a small village near Sringeri in the state of Karnataka, India. It houses several brahmin families associated with the Sringeri Sharada Peetham and local temples.

topPlaces.name: Agasavalli
topPlaces.description: Agasavalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Sringeri taluk of Chikkamagaluru district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Addagadde
topPlaces.description: Addagadde is a village on the banks of river Tunga in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in Sringeri taluk of Chikkamagaluru district at a distance of 8 km away from Sringeri, on Sringeri to Shivamogga highway.

topPlaces.name: Agalagandi
topPlaces.description: Agalagandi is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Koppa taluk of Chikkamagaluru district in Karnataka.

The peetham or matha is traditionally believed to have been established by Ādi Śaṅkara to preserve and propagate Sanātana Dharma and Advaita Vedānta, the doctrine of non-dualism.

Sringeri (IAST: Śṛṅgerī; Kannada: [ʃriŋɡeːri]) also called Shringeri is a hill town and Taluk headquarters located in Chikmagalur district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Sringeri is the site of Sri Sharadamba temple, a part of the Sringeri Sharada Peetham established by Adi Shankaracharya.
Vidyaranyapura Agrahara is a small village near Sringeri in the state of Karnataka, India. It houses several brahmin families associated with the Sringeri Sharada Peetham and local temples.
Agasavalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Sringeri taluk of Chikkamagaluru district in Karnataka.

Addagadde is a village on the banks of river Tunga in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in Sringeri taluk of Chikkamagaluru district at a distance of 8 km away from Sringeri, on Sringeri to Shivamogga highway.
Agalagandi is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Koppa taluk of Chikkamagaluru district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shringeri Sharadamba Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shringeri Sharadamba Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shringeri Sharadamba Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (64 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (76 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shringeri Sharadamba Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shringeri Sharadamba Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shringeri Sharadamba Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shringeri Sharadamba Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shringeri Sharadamba Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sringeri Sharada Peetham, Sringeri, Vidyaranyapura Agrahara, Sringeri, Agasavalli, Addagadde.
